body:
# Components

## Application Security Management (WAF)

* :bug: Forbidden attempt to set different raw URI for given request context - issue #10700 (#10709 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles::test_tube: Set sampling decision maker for AI Guard (#10702 - @smola)
* :bug:  Always collect response headers in span when AppSec is enabled (#10648 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Force manual keep of traces for AI Guard (#10625 - @smola)
* :bug: Optimize AppSecRequestContext numeric conversion to eliminate exceptions on hot path (#10520 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Improve API Security sampling when tracers lack HTTP routes(#10424 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: HTTP Endpoint Inference for Trace Resource Renaming  (#10393 - @jandro996)

## Configuration

* :sparkles: Add DD_OTLP_METRICS_COMPRESSION setting and map OTel env-vars to it (#10680 - @mcculls)

## Continuous Integration Visibility

* :bug: Fix usage of deprecated field in AndroidGradleUtils (#10710 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :broom: Refactor execution policies (#10676 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Add display name as parameter in JUnit5 dynamic tests (#10649 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Avoid computing merge base for PR info in DDCI legacy mode (#10624 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles::zap: Saving buildGitInfo lambda into a member variable (#10615 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Implement early exit for retry mechanisms (#10604 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :bug: Validate path traversals in repo root (#10568 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Introduce pagination support for known tests API (#10536 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Create final status tag on test events (#10528 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Fix Job URL format for Github Actions (#10514 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Improve git security settings (#10486 - @daniel-mohedano)

## Crash Tracking

* :sparkles: Preserve the function relative address when parsing a crash (#10544 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles: Add J9/OpenJ9 crash tracking support (#10496 - @jbachorik)
* :sparkles: Improve crashtracking payload and add build_id and relative address (#10469 - @amarziali)

## Data Streams Monitoring

* :bug: Fixed kafka produce extractor error (#10610 - @kr-igor)

## Database Monitoring

* :bug: Write base hash to current span when injected in DBM comment (#10450 - @vandonr)

## Dynamic Instrumentation

* :bug: Fix race condition for Failed Test Replay (#10679 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :bug: Fix Windows path parsing in JarScanner (#10664 - @tylfin)
* :sparkles: Refactor to store samplers inside probes (#10605 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix SymDB jar processing (#10592 - @jpbempel)
* :sparkles: Send debugger logs to DEBUGGER track (#10585 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix Capture Expression on primitives (#10549 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Add rate limit on span decoration probe errors (#10529 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix method parameters JVM bug (#10521 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix Capture Expressions support for multi-probes (#10519 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix Exception Replay in Lambda (#10505 - @jpbempel)

## Profiling

* :sparkles: Bump aircompressor to 2.0.3 (#10673 - @jbachorik)
* :bug: Disable jdk.CPUTimeSample when ddprof handles CPU profiling (#10634 - @jbachorik)
* :sparkles: Add JFR scrubbing before profile upload (#10577 - @jbachorik)

## Trace context propagation

* :sparkles::zap: Changing traceSource to volatile rather than an AtomicInteger (#10614 - @dougqh)

## Tracer core

* :sparkles: Add manual service name source (#10704 - @amarziali)
* :bug: Do not remove the version tag if manually set (#10703 - @amarziali)
* :broom: Upgrade to jctools 4.0.6 (#10691 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles: Refine service name sources for configuration options (#10658 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles: Add service name source to trace stats (#10653 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles::zap: Creating HashingUtils as alternative to Objects.hash (#10628 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Track service name source (#10607 - @amarziali)
* :bug: Make MemFDUnixWriterFFM compatible with early SegmentAllocator jdk implementations (#10602 - @amarziali)
* :zap::broom: Remove use of AtomicReferenceArray in RadixTreeCache (#10600 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles: Propagate response body in case of non 200 status code. (#10593 - @AlexeyKuznetsov-DD)
* :sparkles: Update `jnr-unixsocket` dependency to 0.38.24 (#10565 - @mcculls)
* :bug: Avoid potential `ConcurrentModificationException` in `TunnelingJdkSocket` (#10564 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles: Add primitive versions of setMetric to DDSpanContext (#10516 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Reuse SpanKind Entry in ClientDecorator (#10503 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Reducing Allocation from GitInfo (#10498 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Caching the primaryInstrumentationName (#10477 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Adds methods for setting TagMap.Entry directly on AgentSpan/DDSpan (#10472 - @dougqh)
* :bug: Remove RadixTreeCache for int status and protect httpStatus short cache (#10236 - @amarziali)

## Tracer internal logging

* :sparkles: Adding Logging for JMS `ITERATION` Scope (#10632 - @mhlidd)

# Instrumentations

## Apache Spark instrumentation

* :sparkles: Spark instrumentation: capture emr step id when spark runs as EMR step (#10670 - @aboitreaud)
* :sparkles: Initial spark launcher instrumentation (#10629 - @aboitreaud)

## AWS Lambda instrumentation

* :bug: Fix Exception Replay in Lambda (#10505 - @jpbempel)

## Core Java language instrumentation

* :bug: Fixed issue with recursive calls which can cause StackOverflowError. (#10535 - @AlexeyKuznetsov-DD)
* :sparkles::zap: Reuse TagMap.Entry objects in BaseDecorator (#10501 - @dougqh)

## JDBC instrumentation

* :bug: DbInfo Thread Safety (#10517 - @dougqh)

## JMS instrumentation

* :sparkles: Adding Logging for JMS `ITERATION` Scope (#10632 - @mhlidd)

## Netty instrumentation

* :bug: Track server context in netty4 instrumentation (#10556 - @mcculls)
* :bug: Track server context in netty3 instrumentation (#10555 - @mcculls)

## OpenTelemetry instrumentation

* :sparkles: Add DD_OTLP_METRICS_COMPRESSION setting and map OTel env-vars to it (#10680 - @mcculls)
* :bulb: Implement OpenTelemetry Observable Metrics API (#10631 - @mcculls)
* :bulb: Adjust OpenTelemetry metrics temporality according to global preference and instrument type (#10545 - @mcculls)
* :bulb: Add support for `otel.java.metrics.cardinality.limit` system property (#10541 - @mcculls)
* :bulb: Implement OpenTelemetry meter storage and aggregations (#10534 - @mcculls)

## Play Framework instrumentation

* :bug: Combine play spans with surrounding framework context before attaching them (#10554 - @mcculls)

## Servlet instrumentation

* :bug: Combine dispatch span with request context in generic Servlet3 advice (#10557 - @mcculls)
* :sparkles::zap: Reuse TagMap.Entry objects in BaseDecorator (#10501 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Extracting span kind & language into static TagMap.Entry objects (#10495 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Caching the primaryInstrumentationName (#10477 - @dougqh)

## Synapse Instrumentation

* :sparkles: Fix Synapse passthru spans finishing before status code is available (#10478 - @ValentinZakharov)
